.file-embed.background: rgb(23, 21, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(26, 24, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(43, 33, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #00FFFF 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#00FFFF, color-mix(in srgb, #00FFFF 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #00FFFF 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#00FFFF, color-mix(in srgb, #00FFFF 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(43, 33, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(43, 33, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(43, 33, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(26, 24, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(26, 24, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(43, 33, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(26, 24, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(23, 21, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

li[data-line=\"0\"]::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
li[data-line=\"0\"]::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

mark.background: rgb(255, 211, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(23, 21, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(23, 21, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
